description_long: This is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, a curved detachable magazine, and a metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a prominent front sight post and a rear notch sight, both made of metal. The handguard and stock are constructed from wood, showing a worn, utilitarian finish, while the rest of the body is primarily matte black or dark metal. The magazine is curved and likely made of metal, designed for rapid reloading. The overall design is robust, with visible screws, levers, and a trigger guard, indicating a functional and durable weapon. The rifle's proportions and features are consistent with those of an AK-47 or similar model, commonly seen in urban and military contexts.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock, curved metal magazine, and iron sights, featuring a worn, utilitarian finish. The design is functional and durable, typical of classic military rifles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, curved magazine, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden stock, rear sight, and the slim profile of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the magazine, trigger, and the details of the receiver and handguard.
